name: flip
title: flip
description: A 3D card-flip between two scenes — outgoing rotates away, incoming rotates into view. Onda's directional vocabulary (`left` / `right` / `up` / `down`) with adjustable `perspective`. Wraps Remotion's `flip()`.
pickWhen: two faces of the same thing — before/after, front/back of a card, A/B reveal. The 3D move is the point; sparingly so it stays a beat.
